name: Panang Beef
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut beef into thin slices and season with salt and pepper.
2. Soak dried red chilis in hot water until softened.
3. Chop the soaked chilis, ginger, shallots, garlic, lemon grass, coriander root, lime zest, peppercorns, and shrimp paste together.
4. Pound the mixture in a mortar until smooth.
5. Pour coconut milk into a wok and bring to a boil.
6. Add beef and cook until tender; remove from heat and set aside.
7. Discard the remaining coconut milk.
8. Return the wok to low heat, add coconut cream and bring to a boil.
9. Reduce heat and simmer until oil separates.
10. Stir in the spice paste and cook for 4-5 minutes, stirring constantly.
11. Add beef, peanuts, basil leaves, fish sauce, and palm sugar; stir well and cook an additional 2 minutes.
12. Transfer the dish to a serving dish and garnish with basil, lime zest, and chili.
